seoTitle: Pelican Lagoon vs Pelican Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelican Lagoon and Pelican Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelican Lagoon vs Pelican Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican Lagoon and Pelican Point.
heading: Pelican Lagoon vs Pelican Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Lagoon, South Australia and Pelican Point, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Point has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Pelican Lagoon (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican Lagoon or Pelican Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Lagoon has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Pelican Point scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Lagoon scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Pelican Point scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Lagoon or Pelican Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
